diagrams.title: Questionnaire Adaptation Flow
diagrams.description: How a Google Sheets change becomes the current questionnaire source, preserves scoring/context contracts, and then appears in the running survey.

diagrams.title: Change Impact Map
diagrams.description: Decision support for whether a change stays light, needs validation, or needs a new version with score-completeness review.

diagrams.title: Value Lifecycle
diagrams.description: How survey results connect to questionnaire snapshots, one-fact-per-key storage, the current violin feedback view, and later OSF downloads.
